channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Illegal parking, 26th June
item.description:
There are multiple cars parking everyday in spaces on the drive of our building. They have broken then barrier and ignore the no parking sign. There is no room for emergency services to get past.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not fixed! Fridge on same place, 26th June
item.description:
Remove ASAP!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warham Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 dumped office chairs, 26th June
item.description:
2 office chairs have been left on the street between Gorham and Monkton House. They are sometimes moved a bit by teenagers, so they might be in a slightly different place when you come to pick them up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Wolfe Crescent, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Scooter, 26th June
item.description:
A child’s scooter has been abandoned on the grass verge outside 105 Oregon Square Orpington. It has been there for several days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Branston Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants put mattress outside, 26th June
item.description:
191 Riverdale road dump a mattress in the street over a week ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag full by bin, 26th June
item.description:
Black rubbish bag by bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes overgrown onto garage, 26th June
item.description:
Bushes overgrown onto garage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monterey Close, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White and black rubbish bags on pavement, 26th June
item.description:
White and black bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping Trolley, 26th June
item.description:
Shopping trolley dumped on the green space area of Thornsett Terrace Croydon Road. SE20 7UH.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169 - 175, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Wheatstone Road and St John’s road, 26th June
item.description:
Flytipping has started up again. The area has been clear for a few months now, but the Flytipping has restarted in the area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheatstone Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste left behind by bin ben, 26th June
item.description:
The bin men finally emptied the recycling bin, after more than a month! However, they decided to leave a substantial amount of rubbish behind. Make it make sense! Please could someone else come and clear this up?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridge Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst water, 26th June
item.description:
Burst water in middle of the road URGENT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Mildred's Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 metre deep sink hole. Getting bigger every few hours, 26th June
item.description:
Growing pothole now a sink hole. Local residents have put cones out to ensure public are aware and safe. Highly dangerous. If vehicles go over likely to collapse even bigger. Have added to previous post to draw your attention to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Malmains Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside 106 Northdown Road Welling, 26th June
item.description:
Suitcase, bathroom cabinet and other various items on the pavement outside 106 Northdown Road. I noticed them today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northdown Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat scratching post structure dumped in alley, 26th June
item.description:
Been here a few days, clearly dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Thanet Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree shots obstructing view of road, 26th June
item.description:
These shoots obstruct view of oncoming traffic for residents and pupils attending Chislehurst and Sidcup Grammar School. Parents parking is already causing concern, there will be a fatal accident following their dangerous manoeuvres and disregard for zig zag and double yellow lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin URGENT, 26th June
item.description:
Please implement a hot weather litter strategy - bins not emptied. This is now unsanitary. Third day running. Please urgently review what you are doing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Duke Street Hill, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please install "Envelope" Bin, 26th June
item.description:
Current bin has no lid or top, so it's a free-for-all for foxes & crows. Please replace with a so-called "envelope bin". Thanks!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and stickers on nameplate, 26th June
item.description:
Please note this is on the Southwark side of the road, but is a sign managed and maintained by Lambeth. Southwark have confirmed this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennings Way, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 26th June
item.description:
Dumped bag of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
